name: Avocado with Dilled Cucumbers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together vinegar, salad oil, salt, dill weed, onion salt, ground pepper, and garlic powder until combined.
2. Pour the dressing over the thinly sliced cucumbers and chill for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
3. Arrange the avocado halves on a serving platter or individual plates.
4. Fill each avocado half with the cucumber mixture.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
